title: Agent task timeline event v1.0.0
description: Structured event emitted when an agent task completes, used for timeline and metrics generation.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this schema. Bump on breaking changes.

agent.description: Agent emitting the event (e.g., builder, reviewer).

task_ref.description: Issue/PR identifier or human-readable task reference.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution attempt.

started_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the task attempt started.

ended_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the task attempt ended.

retry_count.description: Number of retries attempted before this run (0 for first attempt).

recorded_at.description: Timestamp when the event was written to disk.

metadata.description: Optional free-form fields for diagnostics (CI job id, commit, etc.).
